mnemonics: CHARACTERS ARE COMPLEX: Challenges Abound, Handling Rules, Alphabets Require Care, Complexities Everywhere, Taming Text Requires Effort, Encoding Needs Special Attention, Resources Scarce, Scripts Vary.
keyPoints: Indian languages have complex scripts with conjunct characters.
They require special encoding standards like Unicode UTF-8.
Morphological richness leads to a high number of word forms.
commonMistakes: Assuming ASCII encoding is sufficient for Indian language text.
Treating each visual cluster (akshara) as a single character.
Underestimating the importance of morphological analyzers.
